title: Benefits Of Stretching | StretchLab
meta_description: StretchLab increases mobility, flexibility and decreases pain and risk of injury to help those with chronic pain, autoimmune disorders, or injury recovery.
body_markdown:
# 
Benefits of Assisted Stretching 
There's no one reason why people find themselves at StretchLab. Some clients are looking to improve their sports performance, some are looking to decrease joint pain, and others simply just want a great stretch. No matter what your body needs – the benefits of an expert-led assisted stretching routine are tangible.
![Person hunched over](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/stretchlab.com/png/icons/Improve_Posture@2x.png?width=100&height=100&name=Improve_Posture@2x.png)
Improve Posture
Varied stretching techniques conducted by our experts helps to improve overall posture and alignment, allowing you to stand taller and experience less pain. 
![Plant](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/stretchlab.com/png/icons/Reduce_Stress@2x.png?width=100&height=100&name=Reduce_Stress@2x.png)  
Reduce Stress
Stretching benefits both physical well-being and mental health, as its techniques promote improved blood and oxygen flow, enhancing mental clarity, and even energy levels. 
![Shoe](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/stretchlab.com/png/icons/Improve_Performance@2x.png?width=100&height=100&name=Improve_Performance@2x.png)  
Improve Sports Performance
Consistent assisted stretching has been known to enhance overall strength and performance, improve mobility and reaction time, and accelerate athletic recovery. 
![Person stretching](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/stretchlab.com/png/icons/Increase_Flexibility@2x.png?width=100&height=100&name=Increase_Flexibility@2x.png)  
Increase range of motion & flexibility
A proper stretching routine over time increases your range of motion and flexibility – making everyday tasks easier and improving your quality of life.
![Flexed arm](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/stretchlab.com/png/icons/Reduce_Pain@2x.png?width=100&height=100&name=Reduce_Pain@2x.png)  
Reduce muscle and joint pain
Our assisted stretches are designed to help alleviate muscle tension, reduce existing pain in sore muscles and joints, and aid in pain and injury prevention.
